texto: What I don't get about "traditional publishing" is that an author creates a work that they think is good enough to be published. They then have to spend their valuable time begging others to exploit them to point where they end up with a 5% stake in THEIR business. What kind of a screwed of business model is that?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de David Nicol que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “What I don't get about "traditional publishing" is that an author creates a work that they think …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, business, writing-life, com foco em termino e trabalho.
